purpose: Durable decision log for product, architecture, design, validation, and implementation governance decisions.

decisions.title: Use root context directory for human-readable governance docs
decisions.decision: Move durable Markdown governance from .agents/docs into root-level context/docs and context/instructions.
decisions.reason: Markdown files are human-readable project context and implementation guidance, while .agents should remain machine-oriented for contracts and execution state.
consequences: Root AGENTS.md becomes a manifest instead of a long manual.

decisions.title: Remove platform payment-method setup
decisions.decision: Vouch does not provide a standalone platform Customer payment-method setup flow, readiness state, or CTA.
decisions.reason: A new customer has no account readiness gates. Customer participation is established through Vouch-specific authorization Checkout and authenticated claim.
supersedes: Payment-method readiness as customer acceptance gate
consequences: Merchant Connect readiness still gates new Vouch creation.
Customer authorization Checkout still gates participation in a specific Vouch.
Platform Customers remain only for platform protocol-fee Checkout.

decisions.title: Add design-system governance
decisions.decision: Add a durable design-system document and deterministic design contract to govern CSS variables, tokens, component inventory, styling boundaries, and UI consistency.
decisions.reason: The existing governance is strong for product and payments but under-specifies visual consistency and token usage for agent-generated UI changes.
supersedes: System audit as permanent design governance substitute
consequences: Reusable UI additions require component inventory updates.
CSS variables become the preferred token strategy.
Inline styles are forbidden except for narrow dynamic runtime exceptions.
